title: Surface Atelier/CKC/PoseKit/Ingest settings-options features in the operator settings surface
origin: MT-040 audit P5 (out of MT-006 scope) + operator goal directive 'make sure the options/settings has the correct features for this wp'.

scope.summary: Ensure the operator settings/options surface carries the correct features for this WP: Atelier + CKC + PoseKit + Ingest. Backend atelier settings already exist (src/backend/handshake_core/src/atelier/settings.rs). This MT locates the native settings/options surface in handshake_native and surfaces/verifies the WP's operator-configurable features with runtime proof.
candidate_settings: PoseKit framing/lens defaults, marker layer toggles
Any atelier/settings.rs backend keys not yet surfaced to the operator
acceptance_criteria: AC1: Locate the operator settings/options surface in handshake_native and enumerate which Atelier/CKC/PoseKit/Ingest settings should be operator-configurable (reconcile against atelier/settings.rs backend keys).

AC2: Surface the correct WP settings features in that operator settings surface with stable author_ids, persisted through the product's PostgreSQL/EventLedger authority (no SQLite), round-trip proven at runtime.
AC3: Argus inspect + steer the settings controls headlessly (HBR-VIS/QUIET); expand Argus if any settings control cannot be seen/steered.
AC4: Update the in-product internal UserManual for the settings features (HBR-MAN).
AC5: No scaffolding; runtime proof (Spec-Realism Gate); LLM-first/PostgreSQL-authoritative data posture.

hbr_obligations_note: HBR-VIS (Argus), HBR-QUIET (headless), HBR-MAN (UserManual), HBR-INT (PostgreSQL/EventLedger persistence), HBR-SWARM (parallel-agent addressability).
